defs: That which is contributed; -- either the portion which an individual furnishes to the common stock, or the whole which is formed by the gifts of individuals.
quotes: A certain contribution for the poor saints which are at jerusalem.
Aristotle's actual contributions to the physical sciences.

defs: An irregular and arbitrary imposition or tax levied on the people of a town or country.
quotes: These sums, . . . and the forced contributions paid by luckless peasants, enabled him to keep his straggling troops together.

defs: Payment, by each of several jointly liable, of a share in a loss suffered or an amount paid by one of their number for the common benefit.
